name: ng2react-agent
description: Copilot agentic tools for automated Angular-to-React conversion

languageModelTools.name: ng2react_status
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns the current status of the Angular-to-React migration workflow. Shows which of the 8 agents have completed, which are pending, and where to resume. Call this first to understand the current state before taking any action.

angularProjectPath.description: Absolute path to the Angular project root. Defaults to the workspace folder if omitted.

languageModelTools.name: ng2react_analyze
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Scans every Angular pattern in the project: components, @Injectable services, HttpClient calls, HttpInterceptors, @Pipe declarations, @Directive declarations (structural/attribute/validator), route guards (CanActivate/CanDeactivate/CanLoad/CanMatch), route resolvers (Resolve), NgRx/Akita/NgXs/BehaviorSubject state, Angular animations, InjectionTokens, FormArray, and nested FormGroup. Produces a structured conversion-report.json covering ALL patterns. This is Agent 1 of the migration pipeline — run it before scaffolding.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Analyze Angular source and generate conversion report

angularProjectPath.description: Absolute path to the Angular project root (contains package.json and src/).

outputPath.description: Where to write conversion-report.json. Defaults to <angularProjectPath>/ai-workflow/output/.

languageModelTools.name: ng2react_scaffold
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Creates the complete React 18 + MUI v5 + Vite project structure at the specified output path. Generates package.json, tsconfig files, vite.config.ts, index.html, all src/ subdirectories, and runs npm install. This is Agent 2 — requires Agent 1 (ng2react_analyze) to have run first.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Create React project skeleton and install dependencies

reactOutputPath.description: Absolute path where the new React project will be created (e.g. d:/Projects/my-react-app).

angularProjectPath.description: Absolute path to the Angular source project. Used to derive the project name, read the conversion report, and write the checkpoint.

conversionReportPath.description: Path to conversion-report.json from Agent 1. Defaults to <angularProjectPath>/ai-workflow/output/conversion-report.json if angularProjectPath is provided.

languageModelTools.name: ng2react_convert
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Converts Angular patterns to React equivalents. Covers: components (@Component → functional TSX), services (@Injectable → hooks/Zustand/Context), HTTP (HttpClient → axios + src/api/ modules, HttpInterceptor → axios interceptors), pipes (@Pipe → src/utils/formatters.ts utility functions), directives (@Directive structural/attribute/validator/event → JSX/hooks/components/Zod), guards (CanActivate → ProtectedRoute, CanDeactivate → useBlocker, Resolve → loader()), state (NgRx → Redux Toolkit, BehaviorSubject → Zustand, Akita → Zustand normalized), advanced forms (FormArray → useFieldArray, nested FormGroup → nested Zod, async/cross-field validators). Use the 'patterns' parameter to target specific categories or pass 'all' for complete conversion.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Convert Angular components to React TSX

angularProjectPath.description: Absolute path to the Angular source project.

reactProjectPath.description: Absolute path to the scaffolded React project.

componentName.description: Optional: name of a single component to convert (e.g. 'DashboardComponent'). Omit to convert all components.

includeTests.description: Whether to also generate Vitest test files. Default: true.

patterns.description: Which Angular patterns to convert. Default: ['all'] converts everything. Use specific values to convert only certain categories (e.g. ['services', 'http'] to convert only service and HTTP layers).

languageModelTools.name: ng2react_validate
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Runs the full quality gate on the converted React project: (1) TypeScript strict type check with tsc --noEmit, (2) all Vitest tests with vitest run, (3) production build with vite build. Reports pass/fail for each step and lists any errors. This is Agent 8 — run after all components are converted.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Run TypeScript check, tests, and build on the React project

reactProjectPath.description: Absolute path to the React project to validate.

steps.description: Which validation steps to run. Defaults to all: ['typecheck', 'test', 'build'].

languageModelTools.name: ng2react_run_pipeline
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Orchestrates the complete Angular-to-React migration by running all 8 agents in sequence: analyze → scaffold → convert components → convert router → convert theme → convert forms → convert tests → validate. Skips agents that already have a checkpoint file. Ideal for a fresh migration or to continue from where a previous run left off.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Run the complete Angular→React migration pipeline

angularProjectPath.description: Absolute path to the Angular source project.

reactOutputPath.description: Absolute path where the React project will be created.

fromAgent.description: Resume from this agent number (1-8). Default: 1 (start from beginning). Skips agents with existing checkpoints automatically.

dryRun.description: If true, prints what each agent would do without writing any files. Default: false.
